titleStmt.title: SII 9.533: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 533. (A.R. No. 22 of 1904.) ON A ROCK EAST OF THE TRAVLLEER'S BUNGALOW ON THE BELLARY ROAD AT KAMALAPURAM, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Chaitra, śu. 15, Sthiravāra corresponding to A.D. 1531 April 1, Saturday. It refers itself to the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya and records that Sāḷuva-Daṇāyaka made a gift of land for burning a perpetual lamp before the god Narasiṁhadēva in Koṇḍamarasayana-Pāḷya. The writer was Timmapa, son of Liṅgarasa of Cheraṭimaṅgala.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1453 mēle saluva
kharasaṁvatsarada cayitra śu 15 stiravāsaradalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rāja

(rāja)paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa Acyutarāyamahārāyarū pruthvīrājyagye
tiralu sāḷuvadaṇāyakaru namage naḍadu baṁda kāmalāpurada staḷadalu koṁḍamarasaya
navara pāḷayadali śrīnārasiṁhadēvara nityadīpārādhanege koṭṭa bhūdānada kramaveṁteṁda dī 1 ke vīsa 10
naṁdādīpa 1 kāni �yo parimāṇa pālisi koṭa staḷa (mūḍaluḷa) mūḍalu koṁḍamarasaya Uriyapau
ḷiyoḷagaṇa mūleyali cakrakalu 1 Adake teṁkalu nīra hoḷeya dārige bhaḍagalu
vīramāsuvalige teṁkalu cakrakalu 1 yidake paḍuvalu hūvina tōṭa
baḍagalu nele ga mēle cakrakalu 1 yidake baḍagalu rājabī
dige hattira naṭṭa cakrakalu 1 .
Ā dārige luva
tōṭa nīruvarida lu �yo catusīmege voḷagāda
kuṁtūra Etirāyadēvagaḷa makkaḷu vallabhayagaḷū
Agasida nāḍada bāvi koṁḍamarasayanavaru Agasida
kapileya bhāvi �yo catusīme voḷagāda staḷavellavanū
lakṣu�vonārasiṁhyadēvara dīpārādhanege Ācaṁdrārka
sthāyiyāgi naḍeyaluḷadū Eṁdu baradukoṭṭa śilā
śāsanā �yo śāsanava baradā
ta ceraṭimaṁgalada liṁgarasara maga tiṁmapanū .
Digital edition of SII 9.533 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
